description_long: This object is a stylized flamingo doll with a geometric, low-poly design. Its body is primarily a muted pink color, with a long, curved neck and a downward-facing beak that is black at the tip and white at the base. The legs are thin, straight, and colored in a pale gray with darker accents at the joints, mimicking the appearance of a real flamingo's legs. The wings are subtly indicated by angular facets on the sides of the body, and the tail is short and pointed. The overall form is simplified, with flat surfaces and sharp edges, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. The doll appears to be made of a hard, lightweight material, likely plastic or resin, and is designed to stand upright on its two legs.
description: A geometric, pink flamingo doll with a curved neck, angular body, and thin gray legs, featuring a modern low-poly style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow chest, straight legs, and the beak pointing downward, emphasizing the symmetry of the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved neck, angular body, and the distinct jointed legs, with the beak and head profile clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, short tail, and the alignment of the legs, with the neck extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other profile of the neck, body, and legs, with the beak and head in profile.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is designed as a stylized flamingo with no garments or fabric elements.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright on two straight legs, with the body slightly angled forward and the long neck gracefully curved downward. The head is positioned at the end of the neck, facing downward, and the wings are held close to the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The face is neutral, with no visible mouth or expressive features; the eyes are small and dark, giving a calm, passive appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No hair present; the head is smooth and bird-like, consistent with a flamingo.
